title: Conformance test improvement
body:
This pullreq is used for improving conformance test.
1. Fix the wrong regex in multi stage base test
2. Add Hostname and ContainerConfig:Cmd to skip word list for inspect check step.
3. In inspect check step, accept nil equal to empty array or map.
4. Also print command line in SystemExec function to add more debug info.
5. Fix the default docker build command to fit container-diff request

comments.body: A couple of nits, Fix these and LGTM
@ypu looks like you need to run `gofmt -s -w ./tests/conformance/conformance_suite_test.go`.  However make sure to use gofmt from go v1.11 or higher, gofmt from v1.10 or lower is no longer valid.
